Metadata.Title: RECOVERED_SIGNAL_088
Metadata.Author: SYSTEM UNKNOWN
Metadata.Summary: A strange binary transmission intercepted during the excavation.

Timeline.Title: THE PULSE
Timeline.Description: Operative {NAME}, do you hear it? Under the jungle canopy, the machine was waiting. It wasn't buried to be forgotten; it was buried to be protected. You found the connection.

Timeline.Title: DECRYPTION KEY
Timeline.Description: The machine requires a specific frequency to reveal the 'Jaguar Mode'. Hint: Look at the numbers station. The sequence is 1-0-3-1. Type 'unlock 1031' to access the override.
